name: Chanhee Shin Portfolio Design System
description: A minimal product design portfolio system for a Seoul-based designer using AI prototyping as a core working method.
principles: Minimal and editorial rather than decorative.
Evidence-led case studies with clear product context and outcomes.
Local assets only: images in images/ and icons in icons/.

siteHeader.usage: Sticky top navigation with name, Work, Resume, About, and Contact links.
siteHeader.style: Light typography, transparent white backdrop, no heavy branding.

hero.usage: Introduce Jennie and her design focus.
hero.content: Headline, short bio, and a placeholder for a 3D interactive animation.

projectCard.usage: Link to individual case study pages.
projectCard.style: All cards use equal image and content sizing.

caseStudyPage.usage: Reusable case study template for 3-4 projects.

resumeSection.usage: Summarize work history and link to a resume PDF.
resumeSection.content: Role, date range, company, concise contribution statement.

contactSection.usage: List direct contact details without a hard-sell CTA.
